pages.title: Blood-Infused Iron
pages.text: Cast molten iron into a pool of $(l:bloodmagic:soa_additions_ba/life_essence)Refined Life Essence$() to obtain $(item)Inert Blood-Infused Iron Ingots$(). Charging them in a $(l:bloodmagic:altar)Blood Altar$() yields the active $(item)Blood-Infused Iron Ingot$() — the backbone of every blood-tier tool and weapon.

pages.title: Blood-Infused Stick
pages.text: Splinters of charred wood soaked in life essence. The handle component for every blood-infused tool.

pages.title: Blood Diamond
pages.text: Diamonds infused in the altar progress through four stages — $(item)Inert$(), $(item)Infused$(), $(item)Bound$(), and fully active $(item)Blood Diamond$(). The bound form is required for all $(l:bloodmagic:soa_additions_ba/stasis)stasis tools$().

pages.title: Reagents
pages.text: Reagents of $(item)Swimming$(), $(item)Ender$(), $(item)Lightning$(), and $(item)Divinity$() are the raw ingredients for the matching $(l:bloodmagic:soa_additions_ba/sigils)sigils$(). Each is crafted in the $(l:bloodmagic:alchemy_table)Alchemy Table$() — the Divinity reagent additionally demands its namesake essence.
